# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL Server."
      },
      "defaultValue": "[format('sqlserver-{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL Database."
      },
      "defaultValue": "[format('sqldb-{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Azure SQL Server and Database."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdministratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator login name for the SQL Server."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdministratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "minLength": 8,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator password for the SQL Server. Must be at least 8 characters long and contain characters from at least three of the four categories: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and non-alphanumeric characters."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2020-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "version": "12.0",
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2020-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "S0",
        "tier": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 268435456000,
        "createMode": "Default"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2020-11-01').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
